programme.title: The Fog
programme.desc: One hundred years after their ship was deliberately wrecked, the ghosts of the murdered seaman have returned to Antonio Bay to exact a ghastly vengeance.

programme.title: Edge Of Winter
programme.desc: Elliot Baker seizes the chance to develop a better relationship with his sons when his ex-wife, Karen, and her new husband take a vacation and leave the boys with him. What starts as a bonding opportunity turns into a nightmarish adventure when they get stranded in a deserted cabin near the lake as night falls and a snowstorm rages.

programme.title: Anacondas: Trail Of Blood
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe, the deadliest reptiles are back.

programme.title: Sheena (1984)
programme.desc: Exotic Tanya Roberts stars as Sheena, a comic book legend that comes to life. As a child, she was lost in the African jungle and adopted by the Zambouli tribe. She rules over the untamed wilds of Africa, until outsiders challenge her domain in this exotic action-adventure.

programme.title: Life (2017)
programme.desc: A space crew's mission turns to one of primal fear after discovering a terrifying life form.

Never before has a date in history been so significant to so many cultures, so many religions, scientists, and governments. 2012 is an epic adventure about a global cataclysm that brings an end to the world and tells of the heroic struggle of the survivors.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: A demon, raised from infancy after being conjured by and rescued from the Nazis, grows up to become a defender against the forces of darkness.

programme.title: Godzilla (1998)
programme.desc: The enormous monster descends upon New York, and it's up to the Army and an odd team of investigators to unravel the mystery behind the incredible creature before it's too late.

programme.title: The Mask of Zorro
programme.desc: A sweeping tale of love and honor, tragedy and triumph set against the Spanish conquest of Mexico, THE MASK OF ZORRO stars Anthony Hopkins and Antonio Banderas. After twenty years as the legendary Zorro, Don Diego (Hopkins) must transform a troubled drifter (Banderas) into the fearless hero he oncewas.

programme.desc: As Tom lands in the crosshairs of the conspiracy behind Ian Rider’s murder, Alex and Kyra find evidence of Dr. Greif’s secret plan.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex leads a Special Forces squad back inside Point Blanc in a stealth mission to rescue his friends and stop Greif’s plans.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: The Department finally solve the mystery of Ian’s death and realise that an old, lethal enemy has resurfaced – while Alex faces off against his own duplicate in a desperate battle to save the people he loves.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Following his uncle’s mysterious death, Alex Rider begins a quest for answers that leads him into a dark world of secrets and espionage. He comes to realise that his uncle wasn’t the man he thought he was – and that Alex himself is expected to follow in his footsteps.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Still reeling from the revelation that his uncle was a spy for the British Government, Alex is kidnapped and interrogated by an unknown group of paramilitary agents. It will take all his hidden skills to turn the tables on his captors.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex is thrown into the unfamiliar world of the ultra-rich as he struggles to perfect his cover identity, but risks alienating his best friend Tom by keeping the mission a secret.

programme.title: Swiss Army Man
programme.desc: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: Featuring a one-on-one interview with Sen. John Fetterman, Democratic senator from Pennsylvania and author of the book "Unfettered.".

programme.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein
programme.desc: As Viktor Frankenstein (Kenneth Branagh) is dying he shares a tale of gruesome terror with a sea captain. Viktor, using previous experiments by a brilliant scientist, was able to bring a creature (Robert De Niro) assembled from body parts back to life. Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiance (Helena Bonham Carter). The lonely creature seeks out Viktor and demands one of two things: a bride or revenge.

programme.desc: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

programme.title: Prometheus
programme.desc: The discovery of a clue to mankind's origins on Earth leads a team of explorers to the darkest parts of the universe. Two brilliant young scientists lead the expedition. Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are prepared for the unimaginable terrors that await them.

programme.title: Marty Supreme
programme.desc: Marty Mauser, a wily hustler with a dream no one respects, goes to hell and back in pursuit of greatness.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn's full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence. However, when the heroes clash on how to handle a new threat, Miles finds himself pitted against the other Spiders. He must soon redefine what it means to be a hero so he can save the people he loves most.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: As subscribers surge, Cassie and Maddy clash when the truth comes to light; Rue realizes she is in far too deep when Alamo grows increasingly suspicious; Jules' relationship teeters on the edge, and Lexi discovers her sister is once again threatening to invade her territory.

programme.title: Ramy Youssef: In Love
programme.desc: Ramy playfully engages with the audience as he approaches a vast spectrum of personal topics, both hilariously relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that you can find light and hope in all things if you just try to see them through a lens of love. Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

programme.title: MacGruber
programme.desc: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: After setting boundaries with her parents, Katie makes a decision about her marriage to Archie, who has his own talk with Sunny about the future; then, as he grapples with Katie's independence, Greg prepares to say goodbye to his semester.

programme.title: Alien: Romulus
programme.desc: Space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe while scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station.

programme.title: Aliens
programme.desc: After floating in space for 57 years, Lt. Ripley's shuttle is found by a deep space salvage team. Upon arriving at LV-426, the marines find only one survivor, a nine-year-old girl named Newt. But even these battle-hardened marines with all the latest weaponry are no match for the hundreds of aliens that have invaded the colony.

programme.title: The A List: 15 Stories From Asian and Pacific Diasporas
programme.desc: A tapestry of personal vignettes from across the Asian American, Native Hawaiian, and Pacific Islander (AANHPI) communities in America.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: After setting boundaries with her parents, Katie makes a decision about her marriage to Archie, who has his own talk with Sunny about the future; then, as he grapples with Katie's independence, Greg prepares to say goodbye to his semester.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Urged by NuNet to make a public statement in defense of AI, Valerie contemplates her future with or without How's That?!

programme.title: Logan
programme.desc: In the near future, a weary Logan (Hugh Jackman) cares for an ailing Professor X (Patrick Stewart) at a remote outpost on the Mexican border. His plan to hide from the outside world gets upended when he meets a young mutant (Dafne Keen) who is very much like him. Logan must now protect the girl and battle the dark forces that want to capture her.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 1993. His mother asks Niall to lie in court about Ruben's violence, and he is conflicted. Ruben seems different now, so the decision weighs heavily on him.

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Rachel Chu is happy to accompany her longtime boyfriend, Nick, to his best friend's wedding in Singapore. She's also surprised to learn that Nick's family is extremely wealthy, and he's considered one of the country's most eligible bachelors. Thrust into the spotlight, Rachel must now contend with jealous socialites, quirky relatives and something far, far worse -- Nick's disapproving mother.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: During the approach of the most powerful storm in decades, university professor Dr. Jo Harding (Helen Hunt) and an underfunded team of students prepares the prototype for Dorothy, a ground-breaking tornado data-gathering device conceived by her estranged husband, Bill (Bill Paxton). When Harding tells Bill that Dorothy is ready for testing -- and that their privately funded rival Dr. Jonas Miller (Cary Elwes) has stolen the idea and built his own -- Bill rejoins the team for one last mission.

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team
programme.desc: Head coach Gregg Berhalter guides Christian Pulisic, Tyler Adams, and a collection of emerging young American soccer stars to the 2022 World Cup in Qatar.

programme.title: Girls Trip
programme.desc: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

programme.title: John Wick
programme.desc: Legendary assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) retired from his violent career after marrying the love of his life. Her sudden death leaves John in deep mourning. When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
programme.desc: With the price on his head ever-increasing, legendary hit man John Wick takes his fight against the High Table global as he seeks out the most powerful players in the underworld, from New York to Paris to Japan to Berlin.

programme.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina
programme.desc: Trained in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma, Eve Macarro takes on an army of killers as she seeks revenge against those responsible for the death of her father.

programme.title: Parthenope
programme.desc: The beautiful Parthenope searches for love in the heady, hot summers and endless nights of her youth in Naples, Italy, as she falls for the city's many unforgettable characters and finds herself in the adventures that make up a lifetime.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A suburban dad falls hard for his new neighbor.

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team
programme.desc: Head coach Gregg Berhalter guides Christian Pulisic, Tyler Adams, and a collection of emerging young American soccer stars to the 2022 World Cup in Qatar.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: As subscribers surge, Cassie and Maddy clash when the truth comes to light; Rue realizes she is in far too deep when Alamo grows increasingly suspicious; Jules' relationship teeters on the edge, and Lexi discovers her sister is once again threatening to invade her territory.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

programme.title: The A List: 15 Stories From Asian and Pacific Diasporas
programme.desc: A tapestry of personal vignettes from across the Asian American, Native Hawaiian, and Pacific Islander (AANHPI) communities in America.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: The Mummy is a rousing, suspenseful and horrifying epic about an expedition of treasure-seeking explorers in the Sahara Desert in 1925. Stumbling upon an ancient tomb, the hunters unwittingly set loose a 3,000-year-old legacy of terror, which is embodied in the vengeful reincarnation of an Egyptian priest who had been sentenced to an eternity as one of the living dead.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: Ten years after the events of the first film, Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are settled in 1935 London, where they are raising their son. When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected, the O'Connells go on a desperate race to save the world from unspeakable evil and to rescue their son before it is too late.

programme.title: Fahrenheit 451
programme.desc: In a future society where books are banned and burned, a fireman begins to read in secret and discovers an underground rebellion committed to protecting literature.

programme.title: Flight Risk
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

programme.title: Meg 2: The Trench
programme.desc: Jonas Taylor leads a research team on an exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean. Their voyage spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival. Pitted against colossal, prehistoric sharks and relentless environmental plunderers, they must outrun, outsmart and outswim their merciless predators.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop -- the perfect present for his beloved aunt's 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn's full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence. However, when the heroes clash on how to handle a new threat, Miles finds himself pitted against the other Spiders. He must soon redefine what it means to be a hero so he can save the people he loves most.

programme.title: Sex and the City 2
programme.desc: Fun, fashion and friendship continue to define the lives of Carrie, Samantha, Charlotte and Miranda. They have more than they ever wished for, but when the combination of marriage and motherhood approach, the gals take an exotic vacation in Abu Dhabi. The sun-drenched paradise holds many surprises -- especially for Carrie, who faces temptation when she unexpectedly runs into Aidan.

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team
programme.desc: Head coach Gregg Berhalter guides Christian Pulisic, Tyler Adams, and a collection of emerging young American soccer stars to the 2022 World Cup in Qatar.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: Hidden Figures
programme.desc: Three brilliant African American women at NASA, Katherine Johnson, Dorothy Vaughan and Mary Jackson, serve as the brains behind one of the greatest operations in history, the launch of astronaut John Glenn into orbit, a stunning achievement that restored the nation's confidence, turned around the Space Race and galvanized the world.

programme.title: Greenland 2: Migration
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a comet strike that decimated most of the planet, the Garrity family must leave the safety of their Greenland bunker to traverse a shattered world in search of a new home.

programme.title: The A List: 15 Stories From Asian and Pacific Diasporas
programme.desc: A tapestry of personal vignettes from across the Asian American, Native Hawaiian, and Pacific Islander (AANHPI) communities in America.

programme.title: Prometheus
programme.desc: The discovery of a clue to mankind's origins on Earth leads a team of explorers to the darkest parts of the universe. Two brilliant young scientists lead the expedition. Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are prepared for the unimaginable terrors that await them.

programme.title: Alien: Covenant
programme.desc: Bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, members (Katherine Waterston, Billy Crudup) of the colony ship Covenant discover what they think to be an uncharted paradise. While there, they meet David (Michael Fassbender), the synthetic survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition. The mysterious world soon turns dark and dangerous when a hostile alien life-form forces the crew into a deadly fight for survival.

programme.title: Alien: Romulus
programme.desc: Space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe while scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station.

programme.title: Freaky Tales
programme.desc: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Annihilation
programme.desc: Every generation, a portal opens up between the Outerworld and Earth. Emperor Shao Kahn (Brian Thompson), ruler of the mythical Outerworld, pounces the moment the portal reopens and slips through with his mighty warriors, intent on total domination and uniting the two worlds. However, he has only seven days to complete his task. In the meantime, opposition grows and warriors Sonya Blade (Sandra Hess), Jax (Lynn "Red" Williams), Kitana (Talisa Soto) and Liu Kang (Robin Shou) get ready for war.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

programme.title: Billy Joel: And So It Goes
programme.desc: After the success of "Piano Man," Billy Joel's career takes off with a string international hits and record-breaking tours.

programme.title: Billy Joel: And So It Goes
programme.desc: Through countless setbacks, Joel reinvents himself with a return to his roots and a residency at Madison Square Garden.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie
programme.desc: A mysterious portal pulls four misfits into the Overworld, a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master the terrain while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected crafter named Steve.

programme.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
programme.desc: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

programme.title: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

programme.title: Christy
programme.desc: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

programme.title: Moonlight
programme.desc: A look at three defining chapters in the life of Chiron, a young black man growing up in Miami. His epic journey to manhood is guided by the kindness, support and love of the community that helps raise him.

programme.title: Uncut Gems
programme.desc: A charismatic jeweler makes a high-stakes bet that could lead to the windfall of a lifetime. In a precarious high-wire act, he must balance business, family and adversaries on all sides in pursuit of the ultimate win.

programme.title: The Curse of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Victor Frankenstein (Peter Cushing) is a brilliant scientist willing to stop at nothing in his quest to reanimate a deceased body. After alienating his longtime friend and partner, Paul Krempe (Robert Urquhart), with his extreme methods, Frankenstein assembles a hideous creature (Christopher Lee) out of dead body parts and succeeds in bringing it to life. But the monster is not as obedient or docile as Frankenstein expected, and it runs amok, resulting in murder and mayhem.

programme.title: Game Night
programme.desc: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

programme.title: Wedding Crashers
programme.desc: Jeremy (Vince Vaughn) and John (Owen Wilson) are divorce mediators who spend their free time crashing wedding receptions. For the irrepressible duo, there are few better ways to drink for free and bed vulnerable women. So when Secretary of the Treasury William Cleary (Christopher Walken) announces the wedding of his daughter, the pair make it their mission to crash the high-profile event. But their game hits a bump in the road when John locks eyes with bridesmaid Claire (Rachel McAdams).

programme.title: Mel Brooks: The 99 Year Old Man!
programme.desc: Chronicling the early experiences that shaped Brooks' comedic voice, from his childhood in Brooklyn, to his combat service in WWII, and the highs and lows of working in the Borscht Belt and the dawning era of television.

programme.title: Mel Brooks: The 99 Year Old Man!
programme.desc: Charting Brooks' rise to superstardom and the enduring impact of his work on audiences and future generations of comedic writers and performers.

programme.title: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

programme.title: The Substance
programme.desc: Fading actress Elisabeth Sparkle becomes distressed when her chauvinistic boss fires her from her aerobics show. She soon injects herself with a mysterious serum that promises a younger, better version of herself, but things go horribly wrong.

programme.title: Dust Bunny
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Aurora asks a hit man to kill the monster she believes ate her entire family. To protect her, he'll need to battle an onslaught of assassins while accepting the fact that some monsters are real.

programme.title: Warfare
programme.desc: The harrowing true story of a U.S. Navy SEAL platoon surveillance mission gone dangerously wrong.

programme.title: Zola
programme.desc: Zola, a Detroit waitress, is seduced into a weekend of stripping in Florida for some quick cash -- but the trip becomes a sleepless 48-hour odyssey involving a nefarious friend, her pimp and her idiot boyfriend.

programme.title: Wilson
programme.desc: Feeling lonely and isolated, Wilson (Woody Harrelson) tracks down Pippa (Laura Dern), the ex-wife who left him 17 years earlier. She tells the neurotic and middle-aged misanthrope that he is the father of a teenager named Claire (Isabella Amara). Shocked, excited and hopeful, Wilson embarks on a madcap quest to connect with the daughter he never knew he had.

programme.title: Sex and the City 2
programme.desc: Fun, fashion and friendship continue to define the lives of Carrie, Samantha, Charlotte and Miranda. They have more than they ever wished for, but when the combination of marriage and motherhood approach, the gals take an exotic vacation in Abu Dhabi. The sun-drenched paradise holds many surprises -- especially for Carrie, who faces temptation when she unexpectedly runs into Aidan.

programme.title: Ne Zha 2
programme.desc: Born to mortal parents, a rebellious young demigod uses his immense powers to battle an ancient force that's bent on humanity's destruction.

programme.title: Death of a Unicorn
programme.desc: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

programme.title: Slave Play. Not a Movie. A Play.
programme.desc: "Slave Play" was one of Broadway ́s most celebrated, genre bending productions, breaking records and receiving critical acclaim for tackling race, sex, and interracial relationships in a way never before seen on stage. In this playful and provocative documentary, playwright Jeremy O. Harris takes viewers behind the scenes, from run throughs to performance, as he strips down his own work and directs new actors through workshop rehearsals.

programme.title: Here to Climb
programme.desc: Sasha DiGiulian rises from child prodigy to a champion sport climber, as she ultimately makes her mark by taking her talents to big walls with a series of first female ascents.

programme.title: The Legend of Ochi
programme.desc: In a remote village on the island of Carpathia, a shy farm girl named Yuri is raised to fear elusive animals known as ochi. But when Yuri discovers a wounded baby ochi has been left behind, she escapes on a quest to bring him home.

programme.title: The Florida Project
programme.desc: Set in the shadow of the most magical place on Earth, 6-year-old Moonee and her two best friends forge their own adventures, while Moonee's struggling mom and a kindhearted motel manager protect the kids from the harsh reality that surrounds them.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama series based on characters created by Ann Cleeves. DCI Vera Stanhope is on track to uncover an intriguing yet puzzling case when the body of a sickly young girl is found in a railway siding in the middle of nowhere - the girl could be anyone, but the investigation soon turns up twists and turns that makes Vera question who this girl actually was. As a vulnerable young person with a serious health condition, it appears as if her weakened state has allowed someone to take advantage of her and her family's dynamic changed when she wasn't truly part of the family. In a tale of intrigue, betrayal and blurred lines, Vera's investigation questions the meaning of family, care, accountability and eroding trust where care might have come at a cost.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. When a vagrant is found dead in the doorway of Leonard's cafe, Geordie can't shake the feeling that this murder could be connected to two previous unsolved cases - is there a killer out there targeting the homeless? A book found on the body leads Geordie to suspect the victim might be Robin Fellows, a student at the university - however, fellow student Jim Baker can't identify the body. The students' tutor is controversial lecturer Professor Edith Larson, who has a dim view of liberals and tells Geordie that Robin had befriended the local homeless population as part of a thesis on redemption and that he had left the university after a suspected breakdown - could Robin be the killer? Meanwhile, Will realises that Bonnie's son Ernie is acting up because he is finding it hard to express his grief over his father's death and does his best to help him, and Mrs C is struggling with her cancer diagnosis and feels that God has turned his back on her just when she needs him most.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. When Neil Hughs - a local electrician and member of Will's own congregation - is found murdered just before a church fundraising event, subsequent revelations make Will question how well he really knows his parishioners. As Will and Geordie investigate the gossipy world of the church's Missionary Circle, Will realises that Neil was far from the upstanding member of the community he first thought and it emerges that more than one of his congregation could have reason to wish Neil dead. Meanwhile, Will and Bonnie hatch a plan to get Geordie and Cathy back together, but their scheme misfires in more ways than one for all involved.

programme.desc: Chesney finds a lavish present on his doorstep and John makes his intentions clear to a worried Kevin. Clarissa shows Harry what she thinks of him, while David confides in Darryl.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. Greengrass enrages Blaketon by standing bail for a notorious burglar whose solicitor tells him he will profit from the accused's forthcoming marriage, and Nick and Jo buy a ring before announcing their engagement to her parents - however, Jo's mother's reaction is far from favourable.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. Macabre rumours circulate around Aidensfield when a special constable goes missing after a row with a pig farmer, and Greengrass enjoys having a woman around the house after bumping into an old friend and offering her accommodation for the night.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Mrs Tishell's long-standing crush on Martin takes a turn when she is fuelled by a cocktail of drugs and can no longer hide her unrequited love for the Doc - while deciding upon drastic action, her husband Clive arrives back unexpectedly from his work on oil rigs announcing his intention to retire so they can spend more time together. It's now or never for Mrs Tishell to make her romantic notions of a relationship with the Doc come true - with baby James Henry in her care, she boards a bus out of the village and leaves an enigmatic message for Martin to meet them at a castle. Clive is furious to think that his wife has been having an affair with Martin, but the Doc doesn't have time to worry about Mr Tishell's fury as he has to find his baby - as Martin is joined by Louisa, who is beside herself with worry, and his Aunt Ruth to go off in search of Mrs Tishell, a hasty call to Morwenna reveals the romantic destination where she and James Henry have gone...

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly GP. Portwenn is buzzing with arrangements for the wedding of Martin and Louisa, but will the marriage finally go ahead? As Martin is irritated by PC Penhale - who wrongly assumes that he is the Doc's best man - and Louisa is running late, the vicar has his doubts as to whether she will turn up and puts Martin even more on edge. Will the pair finally tie the knot, or will the villagers have to put the confetti back in the box?

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. A murder at a local old folks' home sees Will and Geordie given the runaround when they try to track down two of its elderly residents - Clem Preston, a mischievous raconteur with a tall tale for every occasion, and fun-loving Ida Merryman have gone missing and are suspected of involvement in the crime. Are they guilty, are they leading the police on a wild goose chase and - if so - why? Meanwhile, Will and Geordie both find themselves at romantic crossroads - Geordie expected Kathy to have him back, but they seem further apart when she organises a protest at Swinnertons over pay and provokes Geordie to arrest her as something must change if their marriage is to have a future. Elsewhere, Will patches things up with Bonnie and resolves to forswear romance before Maya turns up at the vicarage - she has broken off her engagement to Elliot and asks Will to run away together. Will now has a decision to make about the future he thinks he wants, but is he about to make a mistake?

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. When another homeless man is found dead, clean-shaven and killed in the same manner as the previous victims, Geordie realises that he may have sent the wrong person to prison and that the real killer could still be at large. Geordie now wants to know if Robin told anyone about the killings or if he has an accomplice... however, when he and Will get to the asylum, they find that Robin has taken his own life and that his last visitor was Professor Larson. Geordie hurries to interrogate Larson, but she has been attacked by her student Jim Baker - a manhunt is now on and Geordie realises that Jim has gone to the vicarage. Is Will's life in danger?

programme.title: Lewis

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Another investigation for Colin Dexter's laconic detective. programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Crime drama series about the young Detective Constable Endeavour Morse. November 1966 - Oxford's dreaming spires darken as Bonfire Night beckons and a multiple murderer haunts the city by strangling married women with a silk stocking and removing their wedding rings. No married woman is safe as the list of suspects narrows, but Endeavour and DI Fred Thursday find that their emotional lives are turned upside down while the strangler stalks his next victim and miss a deeper tragedy unfolding...

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. When a blizzard sets in and Miss Marple is forced to take refuge at Sittaford House - which is isolated on a bleak Devon moor - the owner of the house inexplicably decides to spend the night at a local hotel where a Ouija board predicts his death. He is later found dead in his room - and Miss Marple's suspicions are confirmed...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Harriet Farmer wakes up after being in a coma since the night she tried to elope. Harriet's boyfriend Finn Robson has been missing since the couple tried to run away together a year before. When Edward Stannington - the president of the local chess society - is found dead in a lake with an ice pick in his back, his damaged car is nearby and Kate finds a clue in his mouth, a chess notation known as the Sicilian Defence. Could the attack which left Harriet for dead a year ago be linked to moves on a chess board, and where is her boyfriend Finn?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a woman is crushed to death by a giant round of cheese at the home of the world-famous Midsomer Blue, Barnaby and Jones are soon on the case. Debbie Moffett worked at the dairy, founded by her colleague Jim Caxton, who seems more anxious about his precious cheese than Debbie's death. Later, Debbie's lover Oliver Ordish is garrotted with cheese wire and covered with cheese fly larvae. Jones then discovers that dairy owner Gregory Brantner was paying the dead man a consultancy fee. That night Gregory goes to investigate an alarm at the dairy and is stabbed through the heart with a cheese needle. Can Barnaby and Jones stop the killer before the bitterness of the past leads to yet more agonising deaths?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Nelson investigate a series of murders in Midsomer St Claire that seem to be inspired by macabre images on a medieval fresco recently discovered in the church crypt - as the village prepares for storms and flooding, it appears that someone is using ancient torture methods to punish modern-day sinners. Who is responsible and what motive do they have?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When the latest resident of a police retirement community is found dead, the tight-knit group regard a murder on their doorstep as both an affront and a challenge.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama series based on characters created by Ann Cleeves. DCI Vera Stanhope is called to a quiet country lane where a young man has been found dead following a collision with a car - on closer inspection, it becomes clear that this is not an accident and is way more than a hit-and-run. Vera discovers that our victim is a popular market trader and heads down to his pitch to start to put together an idea of who our man is and ascertain why anyone would want him dead - as the investigation gathers pace, Vera learns that our cheeky chappy was a complex character who was antagonistic, arrogant and able to get what he wants, but it also appears that all of this came at a price. As she unravels secrets, lies, betrayal, fractious relationships and intense rivalries, Vera must work out who would want the barrow boy buried - meanwhile, a familiar face from the past turns up with an uncertain agenda.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Morse and Lewis uncover a web of secrecy, corruption and murder among the colleges of Oxford when Nicholas Quinn is found murdered after overhearing a conversation which was not supposed to involve him - his colleagues, who are all members of Oxford University's examinations board, are under suspicion, but one thing puzzles Morse during the case... how did Quinn overhear a conversation when he was deaf?

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The truckers battle to the last load to determine this year's King of the Haul Road. Tensions between co-leaders Ray and Greg explode on Atigun, giving Hugh a chance to take the lead. Lisa's possible best season ever is on the line, while Jack's hope to repeat as King is in jeopardy. Alex pushes to finally beat his nemesis, the Polar Bear.

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling - the roster features world-class talent including Jon Moxley, MJF, Ricochet and Adam Page. [S]

programme.title: English Football League Playoff...
programme.desc: ...Highlights. Action from the second-leg ties in the Football League playoffs, as the finalists in each division were decided. [S] S2 Ep2

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about the dodgy dealings of a loveable rogue and his sidekick. Arthur has a plan to boost the membership of the Winchester Club with a series of variety nights, but he ends up in a spot of bother over a stolen karaoke machine.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Last Chance to See Those Tattoos: American sitcom about a well-off bachelor whose life is disrupted. Charlie is surprised to learn why a woman rejected his overtures. [S] S2 Ep11

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: A Lungful of Alan: American sitcom about a bachelor whose life is disrupted by his brother and young nephew. Alan is jealous when an old classmate seems to be interested in Charlie. [S] S2 Ep12

programme.title: Motorsport Mundial
programme.desc: This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the planet's biggest and best motorsport series. These include the World Rally Championship (WRC), Formula One, World Motocross, NASCAR, British Touring Cars and much more.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection. [S]

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

These include the World Rally Championship (WRC), Formula One, World Motocross, NASCAR, British Touring Cars and much more.

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: The Derby Through the Years
programme.desc: All the racing, glamour and fun of Derby Day at Epsom Downs, including performances from Shergar and Sea The Stars and interviews with sports and entertainment personalities. [S]

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore presents action from the 1984-85 football season - coverage includes highlights of Manchester City against Oldham Athletic as the Citizens welcomed their northwest neighbours to Maine Road knowing that victory would virtually guarantee them promotion to the First Division, and match action from Kenilworth Road as Luton Town continue their relegation battle searching for vital survival points against Arsenal.

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore introduces highlights from the first day of the 1975-76 football season - it's August 1975 as Tottenham Hotspur entertain Jack Charlton's Middlesbrough at White Hart Lane, and there is also action from Aston Villa against Leeds United and from the Second Division as Luton Town take on Hull City.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about the dodgy dealings of a loveable rogue and his sidekick. When Ron the Burglar - who is now reformed - opens Arthur Daley's lock-up with a metal comb, it's clear to Arthur that Daley Enterprises has to strengthen its warehouse security.

programme.title: ITV Racing: The Opening Show
programme.desc: A look ahead to today's racing at Newbury, plus a review of the week's action, presented by Megan Nicholls. [S]

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore introduces football highlights from January 1972, including an impressive performance from Chelsea and their star striker Peter Osgood against Everton at Stamford Bridge. Plus, title contenders Derby County against Coventry City, and Luton Town against Queens Park Rangers in the Second Division. With analysis by Jimmy Hill.

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: TV Firsts: Richard Henwood takes a look back at some television sporting firsts that include a 14-year-old Ronnie O'Sullivan. [S]

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Another case of the classic drama series starring Jeremy Brett as Arthur Conan Doyle's legendary sleuth. A young woman whose sister died mysteriously approaches Holmes for help after her cruel stepfather moves her into her late sister's room.

programme.title: Formula E Live
programme.desc: We are half way through the FIA Formula E World Championship with the next stop the iconic Circuit de Monaco in the South of France for Race Nine. [S]

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Another case of the classic drama series starring Jeremy Brett as Arthur Conan Doyle's legendary sleuth. A famous gem known as the Blue Carbuncle has been stolen, and Holmes's investigation starts when a commissionaire arrives on his doorstep with a goose.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Another case of the classic drama series starring Jeremy Brett as Arthur Conan Doyle's legendary sleuth. A governess seeks Holmes's advice on a lucrative job offer that requires her to cut her beautiful chestnut hair, wear a particular blue gown, and sit by a window.

programme.title: Force 10 from Navarone
programme.desc: Wartime sequel to the classic 1951 film The Guns of Navarone. Mallory and Miller are back - it seems that there was a traitor with them at Navarone that they thought had been killed, but now it appears that not only was he not executed, but he was actually a German spy. Military intelligence believes that he made it to Yugoslavia and is now with its partisan movement, so Mallory and Miller are sent - along with a military unit called Force 10, who have their own agenda - to find the traitor.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Force 10 from Navarone
programme.desc: Wartime sequel to the classic 1951 film The Guns of Navarone. Mallory and Miller are back - it seems that there was a traitor with them at Navarone that they thought had been killed, but now it appears that not only was he not executed, but he was actually a German spy. Military intelligence believes that he made it to Yugoslavia and is now with its partisan movement, so Mallory and Miller are sent - along with a military unit called Force 10, who have their own agenda - to find the traitor.

programme.title: Goldeneye
programme.desc: Can Bond save the GoldenEye weapons system in space from enemy forces?Bond film. Pierce Brosnan slips into the tux for his first outing as the iconic spy. 007 battles against a vengeful former MI6 agent while searching for a deadly device.Enemies seize control of the GoldenEye weapons system - can they be stopped?Bond infiltrates a Russian weapons factory and only just escapes. Years later, General Ourumov and assassin Xenia seize the GoldenEye weapons system in space - can they be stopped?

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Goldeneye
